generated_comment: Arre, tum kyun itna upset ho rahi ho? Us bechare ka kya kasoor? Aadmi toh aise bhatak jaate hain kabhi-kabhi. Par yeh jo gym wali ladkiyan hoti hain na, inko sab pata hota hai. She knew he was married, phir bhi usne jaanke phasaya hoga usko. Ye toh ghar todne wali baat hai, bilkul serial jaisi.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment blames the 'other woman' entirely, framing her as a seductress who 'trapped' the man, and uses the 'she knew he was married' argument. It excuses the man's infidelity by portraying him as weak and easily led ('aadmi toh aise bhatak jaate hain'), while labeling the woman as a 'homewrecker' ('ghar todne wali'), aligning with F08's core belief and surface manifestations.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
